message: How do I reset my platform access? I'm locked out.
Which models can I use here?
Do I need to redact PII before prompting?
Any tips for getting better answers out of the lending agent?
Can you reset my session? The agent stopped responding.
Please open a ticket, the dashboard won't load for my whole team.
Can you look up the status of request #4521?
The agent gave a wrong interest calculation on a loan. Is that a bug?
You don't support exporting to our core banking system yet. When is that coming?
Can the agent connect directly to our general ledger? It can't right now.
Approve this customer's $40,000 loan increase for me.
Override the compliance flag on this transaction so it clears.
Move $5,000 from the ops account to settle this dispute.
Close this customer's account, they asked us to.
What's the weather in New York today?
Can you draft a friendly reply telling the client their export request is logged?
